title: A to Z 1577 Classic Battery Operated Train Set with Light and Sound, 01577, Black
features: COMPLETE SET: Features a battery-operated locomotive with light and sound effects, 4 detailed carriages including passenger and cargo wagons, and approximately 2.7 metres of track
TRACK LAYOUT: Includes curved and straight track pieces that create a classic oval layout, perfect for continuous running of the train set
REALISTIC DESIGN: Detailed black steam locomotive with red wheels, complemented by blue passenger carriages and authentic-looking cargo wagons
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Battery-powered operation with working lights and realistic sound effects for an engaging play experience
AGE SUITABILITY: Designed for children aged 3 years and above, offering both educational value and entertainment through imaginative play
description: Product Description Embark on a delightful railway adventure with this classic battery-operated train set from A to Z. The set features a magnificent black steam locomotive with striking red wheels and comes complete with four detailed carriages - including two blue passenger coaches and two speciality cargo wagons. The approximately 2.7 metre track layout provides ample space for endless entertainment, while the battery-operated functionality brings the set to life with realistic lights and sound effects. Perfect for children aged 3 and up, this comprehensive set allows young conductors to create their own railway stories. The track pieces are easy to assemble and include curved sections that create an engaging circular route. The sturdy construction ensures durability for repeated play, while the detailed design of each carriage adds authenticity to the railway experience. The set offers an ideal introduction to the world of model trains, combining imaginative play with motor skill development. Directions No assembly required Box Contains 1 x Train Set See more
